name: KD-Bali Banten Checklist Schema
purpose: Local-first event checklist model for banten/sarana per adat event instance; Firestore-ready for future cloud sync.

fields.instanceId: string; event instance id such as place_123_2026-07-22
fields.title: string

validationNote: Banten/sarana templates are general placeholders. User must confirm with family tradition, pemangku, tetua, desa adat, or griya for important ceremonies.
